titlStmt.titl: Mortality and Causes of Death from Death Notification 1997-2005

serStmt.serInfo: Statistics South Africa. National Household Travel Survey 2013 [dataset]. Version 1.1. Pretoria: Statistics South Africa [producer], 2014. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2014. DOI: https://doi.org/10.25828/zs4k-hb60

verStmt.version: v1.1: Edited, anonymised data for public distribution
verStmt.notes:
In the 2013 NHTS, the variable Oldmsal is a derived variable that is standardized to the monthly income per person. The variable Q46SAL was intended to be the income variable, with reported figures refering to weekly, monthly or annual payment frequencies. In the nhts-2013-person-v1-20140718 data file, the figures of Q46SAL were replaced with those from Oldmsal. Thus, Q46SAL and Oldmsal both reported monthly income per person.
In nhts-2013-person-v1.1 the necessary corrections were made to the Q46SAL variable, i.e, weekly figures were divided by 4 and annual figures were multiplied by 12.

stdyInfo.abstract: The National Household Travel Survey (NHTS) 2013 is the second round of the NHTS series designed to assess domestic transport and tourism travel patterns in the country, as well as attitudes about transport.

sumDscr.geogUnit: The lowest level of geographic aggregation covered by the data is magisterial district.
sumDscr.universe: The target population of the survey consists of all private households in all nine provinces of South Africa and residents in workers' hostels. The survey does not cover other collective living quarters such as students' hostels, old-age homes, hospitals, prisons and military barracks.

stdyInfo.notes: Household: household characteristics, socio-economic circumstances of households. Individual: demographic information (sex, age, race), domestic transport and tourism travel patterns, and attitudes concerning transport

anlyInfo.dataAppr: The original report (called a Release) provided by Statistics SA had incorrect information on response rates. This document has been replaced by a version amended by Statistics SA to reflect the correct response rates for the survey.

useStmt.citReq: Statistics South Africa. National Household Travel Survey 2013 [dataset]. Version 1.1. Pretoria: Statistics South Africa [producer], 2014. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2014. DOI: https://doi.org/10.25828/zs4k-hb60
useStmt.conditions: Public access data for use under a Creative Commons CC-BY (Attribution-only) License

catgry.labl: Dwelling/house or brick/concrete block structure on a separate stand or yard or on farm
Traditional dwelling/hut/structure made of traditional materials
Flat or apartment in a block of flats
Informal dwelling/shack Not in backyard, e.g. in an informal/squatter settlement or on farm
Room/ flat let on a property or a larger dwelling/ servants' quarters/granny flat

var.name: Q73OTHR
var.labl: Other income sources eg. Rental incoome,interest

catgry.labl: Sales of farming products and services
other income sources e.g. rental income, interest

var.labl: Car/bakkies/Station wagons owned by the employer

var.name: Q710CARHH
var.labl: Car/bakkies/Station wagons owned by the household

Do not need to go there

Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there
Do not need to go there

No taxis at specific times e.g. late at night
No trains at specific times e.g late at night

No taxis at specific times e.g. late at night
No trains at specific times e.g late at night
Flexibility (you can travel wherever you want, whenever you want)
Distance from home to transport/ accessibility

var.labl: Time taken to nearest taxi station

var.labl: Time taken to nearest bus station

var.name: Q83DWLKTRAIN
var.labl: Time taken to nearest train station

No knowledge of timetable and routes

var.name: Q87ADISTM
var.labl: The distance between the train station and your home (Metrorail)

var.name: Q87ADISTS
var.labl: The distance between the train station and your home (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87ADISTB
var.labl: The distance between the train station and your home (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87ADISTG
var.labl: The distance between the train station and your home (Gautrain)

var.name: Q87CSECUM
var.labl: Security on the walk to/from the station (Metrorail)

var.name: Q87CSECUS
var.labl: Security on the walk to/from the station (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87CSECUB
var.labl: Security on the walk to/from the station (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87CSECUG
var.labl: Security on the walk to/from the station (Gautrain)

var.labl: The level of crowding in the train (Metrorail)

var.labl: The level of crowding in the train (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87FCROWDB
var.labl: The level of crowding in the train (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87FCROWDG
var.labl: The level of crowding in the train (Gautrain)

var.name: Q87HPEAKM
var.labl: The frequency of trains during peak period (Metrorail)

var.name: Q87HPEAKB
var.labl: The frequency of trains during peak period (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87HPEAKS
var.labl: The frequency of trains during peak period (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87HPEAKG
var.labl: The frequency of trains during peak period (Gautrain)

var.labl: The frequency of trains during off-peak period (Metrorail)

var.labl: The frequency of trains during off-peak period (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87IOFFPB
var.labl: The frequency of trains during off-peak period (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87IOFFPG
var.labl: The frequency of trains during off-peak period (Gautrain)

var.labl: The facilities at the stations e.g. toilets, offices (Metrorail)

var.name: Q87LFACILS
var.labl: The facilities at the stations e.g. toilets, offices (Shosholoza)

var.name: Q87LFACILB
var.labl: The facilities at the stations e.g. toilets, offices (Bluetrain)

var.name: Q87LFACILG
var.labl: The facilities at the stations e.g. toilets, offices (Gautrain)

var.name: Q89YNOT1
var.labl: Reason1 for not using a bus

var.name: Q810ADISTBUSB
var.labl: The distance between the bus stop and your home (Bus)

var.name: Q810ADISTBUSBR
var.labl: The distance between the bus stop and your home (BRT/IRT Bus)

var.name: Q810BTRAVTIBR

var.name: Q810FCROBUSBR

var.name: Q810HFREPEBR
var.labl: The frequency of buses during peak period (BRT/IRT Bus)

var.name: Q810IFREOFB

var.name: Q813NBEHAVE

var.name: Q11ASEE
var.labl: Seeing (even with glasses if he/she wears them)

var.name: Q11BHEAR
var.labl: Hearing (even with a hearing aid, if he/she wears one)

var.name: Q11CWALK
var.labl: Walking a kilometre or climbing a flight of steps

var.name: Q11ECARE
var.labl: With self-care, such as washing or dressing

var.name: Q11FCOMM
var.labl: In communicating in his/her usual language including sign language

var.name: Q22TRIP
var.labl: Travel in the last seven days

catgry.labl: 8. Disabled: unable to leave the house
12. No interest/Nothing to see or do that appeals to me
1. Pre-school (including day care, crèche, pre-primary, ECD centre, nursery school)
2. School (including Grade R/Grade 0 learners who attend a formal school)
3. Adult Basic Education and Training Learning Centre (ABET Centre)
9. Other than any of the above
